data.description: At least nine flights from Turkey and six from the United Arab Emirates that were on their way to Iran were canceled today

data.title: RADAR appoints Jonathan Aitken to lead RFID Center of Excellence. Three leadership appointments and internal promotions announced.
data.description: In New York, RADAR recently made three key leadership appointments and promoted several employees internally in response to increasing customer demand and global expansion efforts.

data.title: Revvity partners with Lilly to enhance access to AI drug discovery models; introducing Lilly TuneLab on Revvity Signals platform.
data.description: In WALTHAM, Mass., Revvity, Inc. revealed a partnership with Eli Lilly and Company, expanding access to Lilly’s predictive models through Lilly TuneLab on Revvity Signals platform. This collaboration leverages Revvity's Signals XyntheticaTM and aims to hasten AI-driven drug discovery. Lilly TuneLab offers advanced AI/ML models for this purpose. Revvity, traded as RVTY on NYSE, continues to enhance its offerings with this alliance.

data.title: Marqeta (NASDAQ: MQ) to announce Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 24, 2026, with call at 4:30 pm ET. CEO and CFO to discuss.
data.description: Marqeta, Inc. (NASDAQ: MQ), a leading global card issuing platform, is set to hold a conference call and webcast to review its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on Tuesday, February 24, 2026, at 4:30 pm Eastern Time. The call will feature Mike Milotich, the Chief Executive Officer, and Patti Kangwankij, the Chief Financial Officer. Following the market's closure, a press release detailing the company's financial results for Q4 and the full year of 2025 will be made available.

data.title: Ouster (Nasdaq: OUST) to join 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference, presenting on Jan 15, 3:45-4:25 ET.
data.description: San Francisco-based Ouster, Inc. (Nasdaq: OUST), a prominent player in high-performance lidar sensors and intelligent software solutions for industries like automotive, industrial, robotics, and smart infrastructure, shared news of its participation in an investor event. The company's management will be part of the 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference (Virtual) on January 15, 2026. The presentation slot is from 3:45 p.m. to 4:25 p.m. ET. Ouster continues to showcase its expertise and market presence at such events.

data.title: iOnctura CEO set to present at 2026 J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference, highlighting company's potential in precision oncology.
data.description: iOnctura, a company focused on precision oncology, experienced a significant increase in participation, indicating a rising enthusiasm for its momentum and potential. The company, based in Geneva, Amsterdam, and Cambridge, Mass., made this announcement on January 9, 2026. Specializing in developing precision oral small molecules for neglected areas in oncology, iOnctura's growth is evident with a surge in participation numbers.

data.title: KB Home opens 2 new communities in Compass Pointe Master Plan in Ontario, CA with homes starting from $760Ks.
data.description: KB Home, a leading homebuilder (NYSE: KBH), has introduced Meridian and Solstice at Compass Pointe in Ontario, California. These new homes are custom-built and come with access to community amenities. Situated within walking distance of highly-rated schools and parks, prices start from the $760,000s. This development caters to individuals looking for personalized living in a well-planned community setting with convenient access to local facilities.

data.title: KB Home opens new community in Victorville, Calif., offering homes from mid $400,000s. Spacious yards, near schools/parks.
data.description: In Victorville, California, on January 9, 2026, KB Home revealed the launch of Somerset, a residential community providing custom-built homes with ample backyard spaces, conveniently located near schools and parks. The homes are available from the mid $400,000s. KB Home, a renowned U.S. homebuilder listed on the NYSE as KBH, offers a wide selection of homes in this sought-after community.

data.title: Powerfleet, Inc. (Nasdaq: AIOT) to attend 28th Needham Growth Conference on Jan. 15 to discuss scaled AIoT platform.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, Powerfleet, Inc. (Nasdaq: AIOT) from Woodcliff Lake, New Jersey, revealed their participation in the upcoming 28th Annual Needham Growth Conference set for January 15th. The management team will be present to engage with investors, focusing on elaborating on Powerfleet's advanced AIoT platform and its robust capabilities.

data.title: Compass, Inc. (NYSE: COMP) completes all-stock merger with Anywhere Real Estate Inc., aiming to be the best company in empowering real estate professionals.
data.description: A recent press release dated January 9, 2026, revealed that Compass, Inc. (NYSE: COMP) has successfully finalized an all-stock merger with Anywhere Real Estate Inc. This strategic union aims to unite the strengths of both entities towards a shared goal of achieving excellence. The integrated companies are dedicated to establishing a strong global presence and enhancing their capabilities to excel in empowering services. This amalgamation marks a significant milestone for Compass, Inc. and Anywhere Real Estate Inc. as they move forward as a unified entity.

data.title: Koppers CFO Jimmi Sue Smith retires, Bradley Pearce serves as interim. Company searching for successor. #NYSE KOP.
data.description: In PITTSBURGH, on January 9, 2026, Koppers Holdings Inc. (NYSE: KOP) revealed the retirement of Chief Financial Officer Jimmi Sue Smith and announced the appointment of Bradley Pearce as the Interim Chief Financial Officer and Chief Accounting Officer. The company is currently in the process of searching for a permanent successor to fill the vacant position. This change in leadership comes as part of the company's strategic planning for the future.

data.title: Simon® will release its Q4 2025 earnings on a conference call. Business details to be shared.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, a prominent real estate investment trust named Simon® disclosed information regarding its upcoming fourth quarter earnings release and conference call. Simon specializes in owning top-tier shopping, dining, entertainment, and mixed-use properties. This announcement highlights the company's financial performance and sets the stage for stakeholders to gain insights. The specifics provided in this disclosure offer a glimpse into Simon's standing in the market and its plans for the future.

data.title: Bill Gates pays $8 billion in divorce settlement to Melinda French Gates' foundation, according to tax filings.
data.description: Newly released tax filings reveal that a billionaire and philanthropist made a payment of almost $8 billion to his ex-wife, Melinda French Gates's private foundation.
